# Grayston Technologies

Grayston Technologies is a veteran-owned AI software studio building SaaS products, AI agent systems, workflow automation, secure portals, operational platforms, cloud systems, and integration-heavy software.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://www.graystontechnologies.com/
- Services: https://www.graystontechnologies.com/services
- Products: https://www.graystontechnologies.com/products
- About: https://www.graystontechnologies.com/about
- Contact: https://www.graystontechnologies.com/contact
- Security: https://www.graystontechnologies.com/security
- Privacy: https://www.graystontechnologies.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.graystontechnologies.com/terms

## Featured Products

- MyPokerMaps: https://www.mypokermaps.com
- FeltOS: signed-in club portal inside the MyPokerMaps ecosystem for floor operations, tables, waitlists, tournaments, members, staff, cash cage, tablets, displays, wallet policy, and public-web controls.
- CUOPeration: secure personnel operations platform for intake, approvals, hierarchy, tasking, private files, notifications, drill notes, role controls, export, and audit.
- QrystalDrop: workspace-controlled PQC secure rooms for sensitive file custody, participant-bound wrapping, strict and recovery-enabled trust modes, identity controls, recovery review, SIEM delivery, and proof-batch audit exports. Live at https://qrystaldrop.vercel.app
- VerityForge: autonomous development command center for coding agents, proof contracts, isolated worktrees, verification checks, evidence, and owner-gated release decisions.

## Services

- SaaS product build sprints
- AI operations automation
- Secure client portals
- Operational intelligence and decision systems
- Cloud launch and reliability
- API integrations and automation bridges
- Agent governance platforms and OpenClaw-powered supervised runtime lanes

## Contact

Project inquiries: jforster@graystontechnologies.com
